rows.label: tev006201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our people are now allies. And yet, I suspect
there are those among you who will not so readily
trust us after our involvement with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0002
rows.name:
To demonstrate our new loyalties, I
have assigned a number of my fellow
Larsians to live in your city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0003
rows.name:
They are unlikely to impress you with their social skills,
but their arms are strong and true. Should your city require
their strength, you need only to ask it of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ga Bow is among the nimblest warriors
in our band of mercenaries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0005
rows.name:
And yet she is absolutely effusive in her
praise of the warrior you call "Elma."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0006
rows.name:
She claims that despite fighting many
campaigns on many worlds, she has never seen
a warrior move with such effortless grace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006201_MSG0007
rows.name:
I yearn to challenge this warrior to single
combat, so that I might see for myself
what it is that makes her exceptional.[ST:wait ]
